_note: Storie per le caption Instagram — chiave: pid (serie/numerofile). Scritte in voce-progetto, mai riferimenti al medium. Usate da build-queue.js.
series-1/01:
Some faces don't ask to be looked at.
They look back.
series-1/02:
Words were invented for everything
except moments like this.
series-1/03:
The city kept shouting.
She had already answered.
series-1/04:
Some mornings arrive
before anyone is ready for them.
series-1/05:
Movement is easy.
Stillness is earned.
series-1/06:
The last bus carries
more stories than passengers.
series-1/07:
One day a week,
the city belongs to its people.
series-1/08:
Every route has its regulars.
None of them know each other's names.
series-1/09:
A crowd is a thousand solitudes
standing close together.
series-1/10:
What is hidden
is not always meant to be found.
series-1/11:
Somebody always gets the last seat.
Somebody always stands.
series-1/12:
Two people talk.
The third one remembers.
series-1/13:
Every city keeps one.
Few know where.
series-1/15:
Out here, the horizon
is the only neighbor.
series-1/16: Nobody photographs the ones who stay.
series-1/17:
Eight million people,
all late for something.
series-1/18: The show was never the point.
series-1/19:
Some games are played slowly
because time is the prize.
series-1/20:
Downtown doesn't sleep.
It just looks away.
series-2/01:
Strength is a language
the body speaks fluently.
series-2/02:
Some bars keep people in.
Others keep the world out.
series-2/03:
A city's noise disappears around two people
who stopped hearing it.
series-2/04:
Time doesn't take a face.
It finishes it.
series-2/05:
Every departure has two versions:
the one who leaves, the one who waves.
series-2/06:
Stairs only ask one question:
how much do you want it?
series-2/07:
Grace is not taught.
It survives.
series-2/08:
In Havana, waiting
is its own profession.
series-2/10:
She was already answering
questions nobody had asked yet.
series-2/11:
The wind owns this coast.
Everyone else is renting.
series-2/12:
Some music is played
for an audience of none.
series-2/13:
Look closer.
What do you see?
series-2/14:
Roads promise everything
to those who stay beside them.
series-2/15:
Summer is the only season
that keeps its promises here.
series-2/16:
Everything she will become
is already watching.
series-2/17:
Every scar is a round
that didn't win.
series-2/18: Here, death is not the end of the party.
series-2/19:
The crowd moves as one.
Nobody knows who decides.
series-2/20:
Joy needs no reason.
It needs witnesses.
series-2/21:
The walls say
what the papers won't.
series-2/22:
Some cities don't pose.
They perform.
series-2/23:
For one hour a day,
everyone is golden.
series-2/24:
Every window chooses
what the world gets to be.
series-2/25:
What breaks in a moment
takes a lifetime to fall.
series-3/01: Distance is not measured in meters.
series-3/02:
Some days the wind
is the only thing that visits.
series-3/03:
Home is whatever
holds still long enough.
series-3/04:
What we wear
is the story we can afford to tell.
series-3/05:
Longing has no address.
It lives everywhere.
series-3/06:
Half of survival
is having someone to survive with.
series-3/07:
Every face is a mask.
Some are just more honest.
series-3/08:
Dreams don't check
where you sleep.
series-3/09:
Everything this family knows
is written in one face.
series-3/10:
The river gives, the river takes.
Nobody keeps the accounts.
series-3/11:
Even shadows need
somewhere to belong.
